prompt: Review PR #4574 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It adds stable session identifier headers to telemetry.

assertions.text: Flags use of init() function and suggests using a helper function instead
Questions or flags direct use of os.Setenv to propagate config (should use internal APIs instead)
Suggests extracting the session ID computation into a named helper function
Notes that env var access should go through internal/env, not raw os package functions
